data.location: Delta Landing mixed-use development, Hernando (street name not yet known; door number 1107)
data.short_description: A Cajun restaurant that started as a food truck and opened a brick-and-mortar in Olive Branch is preparing a second location in Hernando as part of the Delta Landing development. Construction began in December of last year. The precise street address has not yet been publicly disclosed.

data.status: opening in Sterling in June of this year
data.short_description: Wonder, a food hall concept, is opening a new location in Sterling, VA this summer. It is one of several Wonder locations open or coming soon in the greater DC area.

data.location: Water Tower District at Schilling Farms, Collierville (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Taziki's Mediterranean Cafe is planning a new 2,581-square-foot location in Collierville, TN as its fifth regional Memphis-area outpost. No official opening date has been announced.

data.status: on track to open in early May
data.short_description: Ray Mah Cafe is a new 8,500-square-foot coffee concept opening in Memphis, featuring in-house roasted beans, Yemeni brews, specialty coffees, desserts, fresh juice, and ice cream. The ownership team plans to eventually franchise the concept.

data.location: Oakville Row, Alexandria's Oakville Triangle (precise address not yet publicly available)
data.status: opening timeline is not presently established
data.short_description: Talkin' Tacos, a Florida-based Mexican fast-casual chain, has signed a lease for a 2,500-square-foot space in Alexandria's Oakville Triangle. No opening timeline has been established yet.

data.location: Gramercy Park Drive, Loudoun Station development, Ashburn (Address not specified)
data.status: moving into a 2,600 square foot storefront
data.short_description: Taste Buds Kitchen is opening its first DMV location in Ashburn's Loudoun Station development, brought by local franchisee Teddra Burgess. The concept blends community, culinary education, and food experiences across 18+ national locations.

Keystone Hospitality is opening a surf and turf restaurant called Chandelier at the former Del Frisco's space on Pennsylvania Avenue NW. The concept will feature elaborate decor including a waterfall fire feature and a modern luxurious ambiance.

Las Brasas Tacos & Salsas is reopening at its former downtown Woodland location after having closed at the end of September 2024 to focus on catering. Founded by Chef Rudy Peniche, the restaurant is known for casual Mexican fare including burritos, tacos, and tortas.

data.location: 2670 East County Line Rd, Suite I, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
data.short_description: Graze Craze, a specialty charcuterie concept, is currently under construction at the Promenade Shopping Center in Highlands Ranch. No official opening date has been announced, though recent social media updates suggest the opening is drawing near.

7Brew Coffee is building a new 600-square-foot drive-thru shop at The Colonnade in San Antonio, with construction slated to start in August and wrap by November. The $1 million project is expected to open by winter, barring delays.

data.location: 9580 Oak Ave Pkwy, Suite 12A, Folsom, CA 95630
data.short_description: Husband-and-wife franchisees Mandeep and Sukhwinder Kaur are opening a new Pizza Factory in the Folsom Village shopping center in the former Folsom Family Taekwondo space. The location will feature the brand's full pizza lineup with dine-in and takeout service.

data.location: 809 N Main St K11, Las Vegas, NV 89101
data.event_date: Before end of the year (year not specified)
data.status: anticipated to open in West Las Vegas…before the end of the year
data.short_description: THE MAC is a new restaurant concept set to open in West Las Vegas near the intersection of Main Street and Washington Ave. The concept is helmed by Adrion Augustus, though additional details including cuisine type and opening date have not yet been confirmed.

Burger Me!, a family-owned all-natural burger joint based in Truckee, is eyeing a new location in Auburn based on a recently filed beer and wine license. Co-owner Tom Farina indicated details remain under wraps for now.

data.event_date: Before end of the year (year not specified)
data.status: anticipated to open…before the end of the year
data.short_description: Laika Cheesecake is planning to open its fifth location inside TPC Retail & Office, with construction on the 1,471-square-foot, $200,000 project slated to start in early May and wrap before mid-November. The cheesecake and espresso shop offers gourmet cheesecakes, espresso drinks, and specialty beverages.

data.location: 4370 Town Center Blvd, Suite 110, El Dorado Hills, CA 95762
data.short_description: Kings Meats, a family-run butcher shop originally based in Diamond Springs, is opening a second location exceeding 4,000 square feet in El Dorado Hills Town Center. Owner Casey King confirmed the expansion, noting it has been a goal for at least three years.

data.event_date: Before end of year / beginning of 2027
data.status: should be open before the end of the year at the latest, beginning of 2027
data.short_description: The Kebab Shop, a fast-casual Mediterranean chain, is opening a new location in Kingwood with construction on the $375,000 project starting in July and expected to complete before the end of December. The family-owned chain currently has more than 50 locations across California, Texas, and Florida.
Moxie Burger is opening its sixth location at Chastain Market on Roswell Road in Sandy Springs. The new spot will join the 122,000-square-foot mixed-use development alongside other local businesses.

data.location: 11049 Magnolia Blvd, Suite 400, North Hollywood, CA 91601
data.status: targeting a June or July opening
data.short_description: Blu Jam Cafe is opening its first franchise location in North Hollywood, operated by multi-brand franchisee Arman Boghosian in a 2,200-square-foot space. The breakfast and brunch concept has been part of the LA community since 2006 and currently has six corporate locations.

data.status: joining the Parker Commons community soon
data.short_description: 85°C Bakery Cafe, a Taiwanese bakery and café chain, is preparing to open its first Colorado location inside the Parker Commons shopping center in Aurora. No official opening timeline has been provided; What Now Denver has reached out for details.

data.status: under construction right now…should be in late May
data.short_description: Phin Caphe is opening its third location in Happy Valley, OR, following existing locations in Portland (2022) and Beaverton (2024). The store is currently under construction with no grand opening date set, though late May is the target.

data.status: planning to open a second location
data.short_description: The Drunken Crow Pub & Grub, founded in 2024 in Vancouver, WA, is planning to open a second location at 8605 NE Hwy 99, Suite 100, the former home of Top Bop. No opening date has been announced.

Three Rabbits Brewing is targeting a June opening at 214 Commerce Place in Greensboro, with a grand opening planned for late summer. The 3,400-square-foot space will include a 1,500-square-foot taproom focused on German-style beers along with other styles.

A new food truck park called Pflugerville Pfood Park is planned for 20011 FM 685 and is targeting a summer opening, featuring up to 10 international food trucks, a kids' play area, and a bar. Partners note that permitting delays are possible and summer is described as their optimistic plan.

data.location: 3001 Joe Dimaggio Blvd, Round Rock, TX (zip not specified)
data.short_description: Tejas Meat Supply's Round Rock location opened as of March 14, according to an Instagram post from the brand announcing its opening weekend. The butcher shop and restaurant concept originates from Georgetown.

data.event_date: June 15 – September 11 (construction window; year not specified)
data.status: remodel of an existing restaurant space
data.short_description: A new TDLR filing indicates Tejas Meat Supply is planning a location at 221 N Main Street in Taylor, involving a $350,000 remodel of an existing restaurant space with a new bar, service counter, dining furniture, and kitchen equipment. Work is expected to run from June 15 to September 11.

data.location: 1100 Peachtree St NE, Suite 110, Atlanta, GA 30309
data.short_description: Paris Baguette is opening a new 2,144-square-foot location in Midtown Atlanta at 1100 Peachtree St. NE, Suite 110, marking the brand's third Atlanta location. The Midtown location is listed as "coming soon" on the website and renovations are still underway.

Rice Stop, a Chinese and Vietnamese cuisine restaurant from the team behind Milk + Tea, is under construction at 210 Ed Schmidt Boulevard in Hutto in the former Stockade Kitchen space. No opening timeline has been confirmed; the owner was not immediately available for comment.

data.store_name: New taqueria (by Sam Hellman-Mass and Fermín Núñez)
data.short_description: Sam Hellman-Mass, owner of Suerte and Este, and chef-partner Fermín Núñez are planning to open a new taqueria at 2002 Manor Road, the longtime home of Hoover's Cooking. No additional details or opening timeline have been disclosed.

data.status: will close at the end of this spring
data.short_description: Hoover Alexander will close Hoover's Cooking at 2002 Manor Road at the end of this spring, ending a 40-year run at the site. The closure is mentioned in the context of the property being acquired for a new taqueria project.

Bap Bowl Korean Kitchen is planning a second location at 10920 Baymeadows Rd in Jacksonville's Reedy Branch Commons Shopping Center. Owner Jason Wu confirmed the opening but noted it is still fairly far off, targeting early 2027.

data.status: looking to reopen in the middle of May, probably the second week
data.short_description: Ale Pie House is relocating from its longtime home at 3951 St. Johns Ave. in Jacksonville to a new space at 1580 Wells Rd in Orange Park following the end of its lease. The menu will remain the same, and the restaurant will maintain its existing hours.

data.location: 20 W Cochran St, Simi Valley, CA 93065
data.status: aiming for a June opening depending on inspections and liquor license permitting
data.short_description: Simi Valley Brewing Company is opening an 8,400-square-foot brewery at 20 West Cochran St., led by Ali Zia, co-founder of Tarantula Hill Brewing Company. The space will accommodate up to 200 guests indoors and 200 on a patio, featuring rotating beers with a focus on West Coast IPAs and lagers alongside barbecue-focused pub fare.

data.location: 10065 W San Juan Way, Littleton, CO 80127
data.status: remains temporarily closed…working dilligently to reopen as soon as it is safe and appropriate
data.short_description: Los Dos Potrillos' Littleton location was forced to temporarily close following a kitchen fire in early March 2026, with all guests and staff safely evacuated. As of an April 2 update, repairs are actively underway and no official reopening date has been announced.

The article covers a networking event hosted by What Now Media Group at The Liam's Steakhouse in Dallas. It describes attendees and their existing businesses but contains no specific opening or closing announcements for any individual business.

data.location: 1900 N Civic Sq, Goodyear, AZ 85395 (at Bullard Avenue and McDowell Road)
data.status: A timeline for opening has not been announced yet
data.short_description: Postino Wine Bar is joining the GSQ development in Goodyear, AZ, at the intersection of Bullard Avenue and McDowell Road. No opening timeline has been announced.

data.location: Multiple locations: 15 Place Simon-Valois, Hochelaga; 6805 Ney Street, Montreal; 1700 Ontario Street East, Village district (zip codes not specified)
data.short_description: Arhoma Bakery, a Montreal artisanal bakery operating for 19 years, has been acquired by former NFL player Laurent Duvernay-Tardif and Sasha Ghavami. The same locations, products, and concept will remain in place following the ownership transition.

Palermo Argentinian Bistro is planning a new 2,720-square-foot location in SoHo at 55 Grand St, the former Papatzul Soho space. The menu will specialize in Argentinian grilled meats, empanadas, and a raw bar, with a beverage program highlighting Argentinian wines and cocktails.

data.event_date: Around end of May (year not specified)
data.status: planned for around the end of May, pending final renovations
data.short_description: Oliver & Co. Bookstore is opening in downtown Howell at 212 S Michigan Avenue, offering books for all ages alongside a cafe serving coffees, pastries, cinnamon rolls, and bagels. Co-owner Stephanie Perrin confirmed the opening is targeted for around the end of May, pending final renovations.

data.location: 14 York St, Toronto, ON M5J 0B1, Canada
data.short_description: Firehouse Subs is opening a new location in downtown Toronto at 14 York Street on April 23, operated by local franchisee Amit Seth near Scotiabank Arena and Rogers Centre. The location reflects the brand's shift toward smaller urban store formats of approximately 800 square feet.

Big Mike's BBQ Smokehouse broke ground late last year on a new approximately 7,700-square-foot flagship location on LA-311 in Houma, which will include a stage for live music, an outdoor bar, and family-friendly green space. No official opening date has been announced.

NAYA, a Lebanese-inspired eatery, has received approval from the Burlington Select Board to open at 112 Burlington Mall Road in the former ConnectFit space. No official opening timeline has been confirmed; What Now Boston has reached out for further details.

data.location: 9393 E Dry Creek Rd, Centennial, CO 80112
data.status: currently under construction (implied by "rendering of planned dining room" and article context)
data.short_description: Kinoya Sushi & Izakaya is replacing the former Bono's Pit Bar-B-Q space in Centennial at 9393 East Dry Creek Rd, led by local restaurateur Skye Ni. The concept will offer an elevated all-you-can-eat Japanese dining experience with two menu tiers covering sushi, izakaya small plates, and optional premium add-ons.

data.status: An opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Taquiza Tacos is opening a new taco shop in Miami's Little River neighborhood at 8246 NE Second Avenue, confirmed by owner Steve Santana. The concept is known for scratch-made tacos using organic, non-GMO blue corn ground in-house and is listed in the Florida Michelin Guide.

Berry Divine Acai Bowls has signed a lease at Goodyear's GSQ development and will open as the chain's 11th location. The concept, founded in Sedona, specializes in soft serve acai with customizable toppings.

data.location: 2625 Easton Street, Plain Township (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Around end of the year (year not specified)
data.status: debuted around the end of the year
data.short_description: The team behind Pav's Creamery in Akron is opening a new coffee shop concept called Pav's Beanery at 2625 Easton Street in Plain Township. Owner Nik Pappas confirmed a target opening around the end of the year, with the menu to include specialty coffees, in-house syrups, and a few gelato flavors.

data.location: 7423 Fair Oaks Blvd, Suite 9, Carmichael, CA 95608
data.event_date: Soft opening next weekend; grand opening in coming weeks (year not specified)
data.status: soft opening tentatively planned for next weekend…grand opening is expected to follow in the coming weeks
data.short_description: DQ Hawaiian BBQ is expanding to a new approximately 1,700-square-foot location in Carmichael at 7423 Fair Oaks Blvd, Suite 9, with a soft opening tentatively planned for the following weekend. The menu will build on the brand's Hawaiian, Asian, and American fusion core with a few new items and upgrades.

Lucca's Italian Sandwich Shop is opening a second San Diego location at 905 J Street in East Village, the former Copa Vida space, with freshly baked focaccia on-site and quality wine and beer. The shop originally launched in 2024 at 600 B Street and is known for Florence-style paninis made with imported meats.

data.location: 24020 Orchard Lake Rd, Farmington Hills, MI 48336
data.event_date: Within a month or further out (year not specified)
data.status: aiming to open in a month or further out
data.short_description: Real Taco Express is planning its third location at 24020 Orchard Lake Road in Farmington Hills, in the former McDonald's space, with owner Silviano Arellano targeting an opening within a month or further out. The Mexican street food concept currently operates in Troy and Roseville.

data.location: 6765 Mira Mesa Blvd, Suite 149, San Diego, CA 92121
data.event_date: Before end of the year (year not specified)
data.status: likely set to open before the end of the year
data.short_description: Handel's Ice Cream is opening a new location at 6765 Mira Mesa Blvd, Suite 149, replacing a Starbucks, according to the San Diego Department of Environmental Health and Quality. No official opening date has been confirmed as the franchise owner had not responded by the time of publication.

Pinky's, a new sports bar and grill, is slated to open June 1 at 810 N. Second Street in downtown Phoenix, the former Angel's Trumpet location. The concept is a collaboration between Robert Cissell, Ariel Bracamonte, and Chuckie Duff, and will feature indoor and outdoor seating for 150, pool tables, and bar fare.

Bubba's 33, a family-friendly American restaurant and sports bar from the creators of Texas Roadhouse, is converting the former Red Lobster space at 8268 East Northfield Blvd in Denver's Northfield neighborhood. Pre-construction work is underway but no official opening timeline has been announced.

data.status: aims to open Memorial Day weekend
data.short_description: Lilly Bird's Creamery, a family-owned homemade ice cream shop, is set to open at 4810 Main St in Shallotte, NC, around Memorial Day weekend. The shop will offer 16 dairy and eight non-dairy flavors made in small, slow-churned batches, alongside traditional and vegan waffle cones and homemade toppings.

data.location: N 44th St & E Osborn Rd., Phoenix, AZ 85018
data.short_description: The Olive Farmer, a restaurant, market, and bar, is opening later in 2026 at the former Santo Arcadia space at 44th Street and Osborn in Phoenix. The concept is a joint venture between In Good Spirits Hospitality and Queen Creek Olive Mill, helmed by chef Bernie Kantak and Perry Rea, offering all-day Italian-focused dining.

data.location: 411 Main St, Pleasanton (zip not specified per article; scraper shows San Francisco zip which is inconsistent)
data.status: expected to open in late May
data.short_description: Caramba, a new Spanish restaurant from restaurateur German Carlucci, is expected to open in late May in downtown Pleasanton at the former Frontier Spice space at 411 Main Street. The concept will focus on tapas and small plates inspired by Carlucci's travels through Spain.

data.location: 1435 Brickell Ave (Four Seasons Hotel Miami), Miami, FL 33131
data.short_description: Séptimo is a new cocktail bar opening on the seventh floor of the Four Seasons Hotel Miami on April 29, 2026, offering a modern reinterpretation of classic cocktails. The bar will operate daily from 3 p.m. to midnight and also host private events.

data.event_date: Mid to late May (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a mid to late May debut…still under construction
data.short_description: Le Nocturne is a new modern French supper club-style restaurant opening at 470 First Street in downtown Livermore, targeting a mid to late May debut while still under construction. The concept offers late-night service with EDM and house music and a French-inspired seasonal menu blending classics with contemporary dishes.

data.location: 4994 E Irlo Bronson Memorial Hwy, St Cloud, FL 34771
data.status: An opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Potbelly Sandwich Shop has filed permit applications to open a location at 4994 E. Irlo Bronson Memorial Highway in St. Cloud. No opening date has been announced.

data.status: grand opening on April 25, 2026, at 11 a.m.
data.short_description: ProteinHouse is opening a new 2,477-square-foot location in North Phoenix at 5310 E. High Street, with a grand opening on April 25, 2026 at 11 a.m. The fast-casual concept specializes in protein-packed, chef-driven meals and features an outdoor seating area and a dedicated to-go window.

Poblano Pepper, a Mexican restaurant with vegan and vegetarian options, is opening a third location at 2225 NE Broadway in Portland. Liquor licensing paperwork shows daily operating hours from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. with indoor seating for 30 and outdoor seating for 10.

Shorebird Bakery, formerly known as Woodblock Bakery, is relocating and rebranding, with its final day at its current location at Woodblock Chocolate's manufactory on NE 17th Avenue on April 23 before moving to 5027 NE 42nd Ave on May 1. The bakery specializes in small-batch baked goods including pesto and cinnamon rolls, cookies, date bread, scones, and a flourless chocolate torte.

data.status: final day of service will be Saturday, April 11, 2026
data.short_description: University of Beer's Folsom location at 1009 East Bidwell St will have its final day of service on April 11, 2026, clearing the way for renovations to begin for incoming tenant Roku Japanese Cuisine.

data.status: target debut set for late June or early July 2026
data.short_description: Roku Japanese Cuisine is opening its second location this summer in the former University of Beer space at 1009 East Bidwell St in Folsom's Willow Creek Town Center. The approximately 4,000-square-foot space will be remodeled ahead of opening and will mirror the menu of the original Roseville location.

data.event_date: Summer (year not specified); construction April 20 – June 26
data.short_description: Kung Fu Tea is opening its first Bastrop location at 663 West State Highway 71, Suite 111, with a TDLR filing indicating construction from April 20 to June 26 on a $250,000 renovation of a 1,500-square-foot space. The Taiwanese-sourced bubble tea chain is expanding its footprint into central Texas.

non_working.reason: No qualifying opening or closure: article covers a networking/industry event with no specific business opening or closing announcements
